channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Assessing Tesla (TSLA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength And Bold Growth Narratives
item.description: Tesla stock snapshot after recent performance moves Tesla (TSLA) has attracted fresh attention after recent share price moves, prompting investors to reassess what the current numbers might say about the stock’s risk and return profile. See our latest analysis for Tesla. Recent gains, including a...

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips After-Hours: Waymo's Massive Robotaxi Lead Casts New Shadow Over Tesla's FSD Push
item.description: Tesla's Austin robotaxi fleet was also reportedly linked to 17 known incidents between July 2025 and April 2026, including two involving minor injuries.

item.title: Elon facing backlash over Tesla SpaceX merger talks, but solar actually isn’t
item.description: On today’s exciting episode of Quick Charge , we’re exploring the industry’s backlash – real or imagined – towards Elon Musk’s SpaceX merger talks, Full Self Driving’s staff revolt, and even large, utility scale solar projects. All this and more when you hit that play button! more…

item.title: Ford Stock Is Moving Like Tesla Now. Its Results Can’t Justify the Premium.
item.description: Ford stock has rallied over the last month amid optimism over its energy storage business. Is the stock still a buy?

item.title: Saw a tesla roadster last evening
item.description: Pretty cool. Was quite unexpected yet appreciated. submitted by /u/Luna7_N0va [link] [comments]

item.title: Why the SpaceX, Tesla merger could hurt Tesla shareholders
item.description: Yahoo Finance's Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Market Domination to break down the potential merger between SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and Tesla (TSLA), revealing why it may not be a great move for Tesla shareholders and why it may be a power move for Elon Musk.

item.title: Tesla Marks 6-Day Winning Streak as Buyers Wait for Big AI Updates
item.description: Tesla stock opened lower, but eked out a gain on Thursday, keeping its winning streak intact as investors look for more concrete artificial intelligence-related news. A precise reason for the early slide was hard to suss out. To be sure, any news on the Chinese car market can move Tesla stock.

item.title: Musk Wants to Merge SpaceX and Tesla. If He Does, He’ll Control a $3.4 Trillion Empire
item.description: Elon Musk is talking openly about merging Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and SpaceX, and he is doing it at a strange and convenient moment. SpaceX filed its S-1 on May 20, 2026, targeting a $1.75 trillion valuation, which would be the largest IPO in human history. Tesla, the publicly traded half of the Musk...

item.title: Tesla’s FSD Software Approved in Lithuania, Reuters Reports
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is included among the 10 Best Reddit Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On May 20, Reuters reported that Tesla, Inc.

item.title: SpaceX Investor Says Tesla-SpaceX Merger Is Only A Matter Of Time
item.description: Early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis says Musk could eventually combine Tesla and SpaceX after the IPO.

item.title: Revel and Voltera are building a big EV charging network for robotaxis
item.description: EV charging companies Voltera and Revel are joining forces to build what they say will be one of the biggest fast-charging platforms in the US, focused on fleets, ride-hail drivers, and robotaxis. more…

item.title: How Is Tesla's Stock Performance Compared to Other Consumer Cyclical Stocks?
item.description: While Tesla has lagged behind its industry peers over the past year, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

item.title: Three Humanoid Robotics ETFs Built for the Tesla Optimus and Figure AI Era Most Investors Have Never Heard Of
item.description: Humanoid robotics moved from concept videos to factory floors over the past 18 months, and three ETFs now offer materially different ways to play it: Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF (NASDAQ:BOTT), ROBO Global Robotics and Automation Index ETF (NYSEARCA:ROBO), and the Global X Robotics & Artificial I...

item.title: Cybercab with Starlink Antenna
item.description: Spotted in Austin, TX. submitted by /u/deepercrow [link] [comments]

item.title: Will SpaceX Merge With Tesla? Elon Musk’s Combined Company Would Own Over 30,000 BTC
item.description: The combined Bitcoin treasury would rank fifth among all public corporate Bitcoin holders globally.

item.title: Another Cybercab driving past Miami Airport
item.description: submitted by /u/TheSurfShack [link] [comments]

item.title: Waymo starts offering rides in new Ojai robotaxi with 6th-gen Driver
item.description: Waymo is beginning to offer select riders trips in its new purpose-built Ojai robotaxi, debuting the company’s 6th-generation Driver hardware across San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix. Trips will be free for a limited time. The Ojai represents a significant step for Waymo, which has now surp...

item.title: Elon Musk Clarifies SpaceX, Anthropic AI Deal. It's Not As Big As Expected.
item.description: Elon Musk clarifies SpaceX's AI compute deal with Anthropic is much shorter than the IPO prospectus implied. Space stocks pare rally.

item.title: Tesla Stock Drops. 5-Day Winning Streak at Risk Amid AI Fog.
item.description: Tesla stock was down in early trading on Thursday, putting its recent winning streak at risk. Despite recent gains, Tesla stock remains stuck, with investors looking for more concrete artificial intelligence-related news. Chinese EV makers Li Auto and XPeng both reported weaker-than-expected...

item.title: Will Tesla Stock Hit $600 This Year?
item.description: The question in this article’s title cuts to the heart of the Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) debate. With shares having clawed back to $426.01 and momentum building off April lows, bulls are whispering about a run to $600. Our proprietary model has a different view.

item.title: Could a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Happen Earlier Than Expected?
item.description: A massive merger between SpaceX and Tesla may be inevitable.

item.title: Tesla’s own AI trainers don’t trust ‘Full Self-Driving’ or its safety stats, Reuters finds
item.description: A major Reuters investigation published today reveals that Tesla’s widely touted “Full Self-Driving” safety statistics are built on deeply flawed methodology — and that the company’s own data labelers, the workers who train the AI system, don’t trust the technology to drive them. The report, base...

item.title: Tesla and SpaceX Merger Would Make Elon Musk A Major Bitcoin Holder
item.description: Elon Musk could become one of the world’s top five corporate owners of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) should his comp...

item.title: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) Doubles Down on Partnership with Tesla and AI Marketing to Increase ARPUs and Convert 1.1M+ Free Subscribers into Paid Users
item.description: User engagement exceeds 59 minutes daily with positive subscriber trends continuingConverting Tesla dashboard users into paid members through LiveOne’s perpetual in-vehicle app, featuring 500+ music channels, 200+ podcasters, DJs, and VJs Launching AI-driven marketing initiatives with Claude, Met...

item.title: The Bitcoin-Miners-Turned-AI-Neocloud Plays Might Still Be an Underappreciated Trade in AI
item.description: The AI trade is heating up just in time for summer, and as we enter the month of June, the SpaceX IPO could crank up the heat several notches as a flood of investors finally get a chance to own a piece of Elon Musk’s space and AI empire. Who knows? It’s speculated that Tesla ...

item.title: Elon Musk Says He's 'Frequently Asked' to Have SpaceX Build Weapons — 'We Have Thus Far Declined'
item.description: War is moving fast into drones, chips, and autonomous systems, and governments are increasingly looking to tech innovators like Elon Musk for a technological edge in modern warfare. But Musk says he's staying out of the weapons business, for now....

item.title: Jim Cramer has bold new take on Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO
item.description: There is always one IPO that defines a generation of investors. For people who started buying stocks in the 1990s, it was Microsoft (MSFT) and Amazon (AMZN). For millennials, it was Facebook and Tesla (TSLA).

item.title: Why Tesla’s AI trainers don’t trust its self-driving tech
item.description: STORY: :: Chris Kirkham, Automotive enterprise reporter "The big promise Elon Musk has made about Full Self-Driving technology is that it will soon turn every Tesla on the road into a driverless vehicle. It’s a big reason why the company is valued at about $1.5 trillion — // ZOOM five times that ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Slips Overnight: Retail Turns Cautious On SpaceX Merger Hype As Analyst Questions ‘Absurd’ $2 Trillion Valuation
item.description: Early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis reignited merger speculation by saying a Tesla-SpaceX merger is “not a matter of if but only a matter of when.”

item.title: SpaceX Could Soon Be Worth $2 Trillion. This $66 Metric Is the One to Watch
item.description: Average revenue per user for SpaceX's Starlink satellite internet service is falling.

item.title: SpaceX to become America’s Military data backbone for missiles, drones, and warfighters
item.description: The U.S. Space Force awarded SpaceX a $2.29 billion contract on May 26, 2026 to build the backbone of its Space Data Network, a satellite-based communications system designed to keep American military forces connected anywhere on Earth in real time. The contract is firm-fixed-price and requires S...

item.title: Tesla SpaceX Merger Talk Grows As Capital And AI Questions Mount
item.description: Speculation is building that Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) and SpaceX could pursue a merger after a potential SpaceX IPO, with some early SpaceX investors publicly calling such a move inevitable. Reports indicate Elon Musk and close colleagues are actively weighing a combined structure that could link ca...

item.title: SpaceX Could Be Worth More Than Tesla the Moment It Goes Public. Here's Why.
item.description: The rocket and satellite company is preparing for what could be the biggest initial public offering in history -- and at the reported targeted valuation, it would already be larger than its CEO's other megacap company.

item.title: Tesla's Optimus robot plan hits major snag
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk let investors know early on that 2026 would be an expensive year for the company. Coming off of its first-ever decline in revenue and its second consecutive year of falling deliveries in 2025, 2026 was always going to be a pivotal year for the electric vehicle maker. Musk ...

item.title: Jensen Huang Joins Elite Tsinghua University Advisory Board That Includes Tim Cook And Elon Musk: Report
item.description: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang has reportedly agreed to join the advisory board of one of China's most prestigious universities. Nvidia CEO Joins Elite Tsinghua Advisory Board Huang accepted an invitation to join the advisory board of Tsinghua University School of Economics and Manag...

item.title: Cybercab spotted in SF
item.description: Cybercab spotted in SF today. submitted by /u/teslaTY2020 [link] [comments]

item.title: Robotaxi has the wrong kind of momentum, but wind, and solar are doing GREAT
item.description: On today’s momentous episode of Quick Charge , we are all about momentum, with solid-state EV batteries gaining ground in China as wind and solar continuing to grow in the US while Tesla’s self-driving Robotaxi fleet, well – doesn’t . more…

item.title: Space Stock Short Squeeze: The Final Act of the SpaceX IPO Hype?
item.description: The technical Wall Street term for investors short selling space stocks right now is “getting your face ripped off.” Shares of commercial space companies were on fire coming into Wednesday trading. Over the past month, shares of Rocket Lab and AST SpaceMobile —to name two—are up 74% and 55%,...

item.title: Tesla Stock Gets Wall Street Upgrade on Robotaxi Potential
item.description: The robotaxi rollout is grabbing Wall Street attention, but investors need to take a balanced view.

item.title: Here's How Much Bitcoin Elon Musk Would Control If SpaceX and Tesla Merge
item.description: If Tesla and SpaceX merged—as is a reported possibility—then Elon Musk's combined entity would hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin.

item.title: Tesla Was Supposed To Be Losing Europe. The Data Says Otherwise
item.description: Tesla’s European sales are growing again after a brutal 2025. But the comeback story has one Chinese caveat.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises. Europe EV Sales Are Helping.
item.description: Helping were sales data from Europe that showed Tesla sold 10,654 cars in April, up 46.5% year over year. It’s been a strong year for European EV sales, amid higher oil prices. In 2025, Tesla sold 238,656 vehicles in Europe, down 26.9% year over year.

item.title: Tesla Stock Could Be Setting Up for a Major Breakout, Charts Show
item.description: Tesla stock is approaching key technical resistance levels as improving momentum, bullish reversal patterns, and renewed enthusiasm around Elon Musk’s AI and robotics ecosystem support the setup.

item.title: NIO Is Up 9% Today: Is It Outperforming Other EV Stocks Like Tesla and Rivian?
item.description: Shares of Nio (NYSE:NIO) are up 10% in midday trading Wednesday, lifting the stock to $5.75 from a prior close of $5.26. The pop snaps a rough stretch after a recent slide of 15% over the past month. The catalyst is product-driven.

item.title: Red-hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club
item.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.

item.title: Tesla’s dedicated Optimus factory construction officially underway at Giga Texas
item.description: Tesla’s dedicated factory for building up to ten million Optimus units is officially under construction at Gigafactory Texas. Drone footage released on May 27 by Giga Texas observer Joe Tegtmeyer captures the significant milestone of the first steel structure officially standing at Tesla’s new Op...

item.title: Tesla, SpaceX merger inevitable, early investor says
item.description: Investing.com -- A merger between Elon Musk's space exploration company SpaceX and his EV giant Tesla Inc. is inevitable and only a question of timing, according to early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis.

item.title: Europe EV Sales Jump 38% As Tesla Rebounds And Chinese Brands Gain
item.description: European auto sales rose 7% in April as EV demand accelerated and Tesla, BYD, Geely and Chery expanded market share.

item.title: SpaceX-Tesla Merger Is ‘Only a Matter of When,’ Early Investor Says
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- A post-IPO merger between SpaceX and Tesla Inc. is inevitable and only a question of timing, because Elon Musk will want to consolidate control across his companies, according to early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Mi...

item.title: AI Jobs Fallout May Trigger Token Taxes, Big Safety Net Changes As Political Risks Mount
item.description: Public opposition is soaring even before AI is a net job killer. Elon Musk and other tech leaders are proposing safety net changes and AI token taxes to head off more-radical ideas.
